dismissed.escapeXml: chokepoint-shaped HTML-escape guard — covered by the lint-sinks ratchet (coarse; quoteIdent-style enshrinement is the structural upgrade)
dismissed.isValidColumn: chokepoint-shaped SQL-identifier guard — covered by the lint-sinks ratchet
dismissed.escapeLike: chokepoint-shaped LIKE-escape guard — covered by the lint-sinks ratchet
dismissed.sealAll: covered by the egress-sensitivity boundary (SENSITIVE_COLUMNS / verifyEgressTotality)
dismissed.isDevAutoApprove: covered by auth-fail-closed.test.ts (the name heuristic missed its describe)
dismissed.isPrivateIPv4: internal helper of isBlockedFederationHost — covered by the SSRF block-host totality
dismissed.normalizeHost: feeds isBlockedFederationHost + the federation fetch — covered transitively by SSRF + federation tests
dismissed.isMemberActive: enforced inside the applyKernelRules kernel-hook chokepoint, not at scattered sites
dismissed.ensureAuditTriggers: idempotent infra setup, not a fail-open guard
dismissed.verifyFieldsIntegrity: a boot integrity verifier (itself a check), not a remembered guard
dismissed.hasPasskey: a read ('does a passkey exist') used to choose UI, not a security gate
dismissed.hasFacet: a read ('does this facet exist on the pattern') used for validation messages — the write/read boundary is the trusted flag + writeClass + quoteIdent chokepoints, not this helper

charts.owner-trusted: Full kernel access — the ownerDataCtx capability (the only trusted:true reader/writer).
charts.served-untrusted: Public reads + ingress/upload writes — the servedDataCtx capability (trusted:false).
charts.agent-mcp: The MCP tool surface — agent input, consent-gated, never trusted with the kernel.
charts.public-egress: Served HTTP responses (/o /p /f) and the /ws broadcast — leaves the DO in the clear.
charts.federated: Cross-hive resolve over the network — a sovereign foreign hive.
charts.storage: The SQLite / R2 substrate beneath every chart.

ownerDataCtx.translates: raises trust to kernel-full — the sole trusted:true capability; structurally the only door up

servedDataCtx.translates: lowers to trusted:false — an untrusted ctx may neither read nor write a kernel pattern

query.translates: refuses a kernel-pattern READ from an untrusted ctx (the symmetric read half of the trust flag)

applyKernelRules.translates: applies ON_CREATE/ON_WRITE/IMMUTABLE kernel hooks before the row lands — forged/immutable fields refused

writeClass.translates: resolves a pattern's write-class (User/System/Internal) — a System/Internal pattern is not agent-writable

SENSITIVE_COLUMNS.translates: declares secret/redact columns — born-hashed at mint and stripped by seal on every outward emission

sealAll.translates: strips SENSITIVE_COLUMNS from rows before they leave the DO (every served emission routes through it)

inertHeaders.translates: stamps Content-Security-Policy: sandbox so agent-authored egress can't execute as first-party script

denyUnlessBearerScope.translates: refuses an unlisted served read unless the request carries a bearer token whose scope matches

isBroadTokenScope.translates: recognizes broad token scopes so minting one is consent-gated — an agent can't silently mint '*' standing access

findUngatedCredentialMints.translates: proves every secret-minting pattern's create is consent-gated — a misclassified patch_only minter fails the build

isBlockedFederationHost.translates: blocks loopback/private/link-local/metadata hosts outright — they can't be allow-listed or token-leaked-to

mintSecrets.translates: generates secret columns as a digest BEFORE insert — a read yields a hash, never a usable bearer

currentHost.translates: returns WORKER_HOST and IGNORES the inbound Host — a spoofed Host can't poison an owner capability URL

quoteIdent.translates: quotes a SQL identifier (pattern/column) before interpolation — beneath the kernel-column allow-lists

nonTransition.PATTERN_EFFECTS: registry-completeness within storage (post-mutate effects), not a trust crossing
nonTransition.FACET_RESERVED_COLUMNS: facet/kernel-column partition at propose_change — a naming-collision totality, not a trust crossing
nonTransition.findStoredDerivedAggregates: data-is-destiny no-hybrid schema property — a doctrine ratchet over the schema, not a trust crossing
nonTransition.TOOLS: tools SSOT reconciliation (Session) — a declaration-totality, not a trust crossing
